recommendations.title: Takedown

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Hackers
recommendations.overview: Along with his new friends, a teenager who was arrested by the US Secret Service and banned from using a computer for writing a computer virus discovers a plot by a nefarious hacker, but they must use their computer skills to find the evidence while

recommendations.title: The Matrix
recommendations.overview: Set in the 22nd century, The Matrix tells the story of a computer hacker who joins a group of underground insurgents fighting the vast and powerful computers who now rule the earth.

recommendations.title: Live Free or Die Hard
recommendations.overview: John McClane is back and badder than ever, and this time he calls on the services of a young hacker in his bid to stop a ring of Internet terrorists intent on taking control of America's computer infrastructure.

recommendations.title: Grind
recommendations.overview: Four skaters follow their idol on his summer tour in an attempt to get noticed, get sponsored, and become stars themselves.

recommendations.title: Hot Seat
recommendations.overview: An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions, another man must try to penetrate the booby-trapped building to get the young man off the hot seat.

recommendations.title: The Patriot
recommendations.overview: After proving himself on the field of battle in the French and Indian War, Benjamin Martin wants nothing more to do with such things, preferring the simple life of a farmer. But when his son Gabriel enlists in the army to defend their new nation, Ame

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo

recommendations.title: WarGames: The Dead Code
